markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Resolve critical 500 errors blocking the Batch 3 redirect project.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Critical 500 Errors:** InnoWell dev team changed page URLs in Prismic \~2 months ago without redirects, causing 500 errors and a massive traffic drop.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [**Immediate Fix:** Israel will implement an urgent code-based redirect tonight to fix the 500s, pointing old URLs to their current live versions.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**Blocker Resolved:** The 500 errors are the source of Israel's local build failures, which previously blocked deployments.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Phased Rollout:** The fix will be deployed first, followed by the planned Batch 3 redirects from current live URLs to the new, desired structure.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Unannounced URL Changes & 500 Errors

  - [The Batch 3 redirect project is blocked by critical 500 errors on city-level ketamine pages.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [**Cause:** InnoWell dev team changed page URLs in Prismic \~2 months ago to support an ad campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [**Impact:** No redirects were implemented → 500 errors for all old URLs → massive traffic drop since September.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [**Significance:** The 500 errors are the source of Israel's local build failures, which previously blocked deployments.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)

### The Solution: Phased Redirect Strategy

  - [Israel will implement a two-phase redirect strategy to fix the errors and complete the project.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [**Phase 1 (Tonight): Fix 500s**](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Action:** Code-based redirect from old, broken URLs → current live URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Code complete tonight (\~1 hour).](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Rationale:** An urgent fix to stop serving 500s and prevent further SEO damage.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**Phase 2 (Post-Deployment): Complete Batch 3**](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [**Action:** Redirect from current live URLs → new, desired URL structure.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is the original scope of the Batch 3 project, which can proceed once Phase 1 is live.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Israel:**](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Implement Phase 1 redirect code tonight.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Confirm dynamic redirect functionality on staging before Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
      - [Request urgent deployment of Phase 1 from InnoWell.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [Investigate the rationale for the unannounced URL changes.](https://fathom.video/share/ECUFXXxMwbyDv8vs1E9xq7Bn5MpswafC?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
